nasb.text: When Joab came out from David, he sent messengers after Abner, and they brought him back from the well of Sirah; but David did not know it.

esv.text: When Joab came out from David’s presence, he sent messengers after Abner, and they brought him back from the cistern of Sirah. But David did not know about it.

cnv.text: 約押從大衛那裡出來，就差派使者去追趕押尼珥，使者從西拉的水井那裡把他帶回來。可是，大衛一點都不知道。

ccb.text: 约押从大卫那里出来，派人去追押尼珥，他们在西拉井追上了他，把他带了回来。大卫对这件事一无所知。
